Unity
Most Common Mistakes
● Appeals to family are only possible for people who
are actually related to you.
● To initiate unity, think of a core value you have in
common. Unity is not being like someone else, it is
feeling of someone else. It’s not enough that you and
someone else are both left-handed and blonde.
Instead, you both have to have a core value that is
central to both of your identities.
● The tendency to mix up unity with liking and social
proof.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
